name: SAM HELSON NUNES DINIZ
title: Software Developer · Computer Engineer
summary:
26 years old, Software Developer specialized in Java Back-End, focused on building scalable REST APIs and microservices architectures. I have been working professionally for 3 years, developing and maintaining public, private, and freelance management systems. My core technologies include Java, Spring Boot, Git/GitLab, Oracle, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, RabbitMQ, WebSocket, Docker, and SonarQube.

I also have complementary knowledge in Scrum, Linux, Networking basics, HTML/CSS/JS, QA support, UX/UI basics, and technical English at a B1 level. Available to work on-site in other Brazilian states, also in another country, with flexibility for travel and relocation, and also open to remote opportunities.

experience.company: SEAP - State Secretariat for Penitentiary Administration of Maranhao (Sao Luis, Maranhao, Brazil)
bullets: Designed and developed an asynchronous API for orchestrating inmate entries and exits across all prison facilities in the state of Maranhao, integrating Intelbras facial biometric devices via REST with real-time validation, for monitoring operational activities to ensure sentence reduction compliance.
Used RabbitMQ as a message broker, supporting high volumes of simultaneous events and real-time updates for operational dashboards and monitoring systems via WebSocket.

Migrated legacy monolithic systems to a microservices REST API architecture with Spring Boot: HR (public servant screening, registration, and access delegation), Warehouse, Help-Desk, Dental Care, Clinical Care, Educational Care, and Queue Caller systems, automating various critical manual processes within the penitentiary system.
Hands-on experience in maintenance, applying continuous improvements in production environments.
Persisted detailed access, movement, and audit logs, ensuring full traceability of events.
Automated PDF report generation with JasperReports, eliminating recurring manual operational processes.
Enhanced security, maintainability, and code standardization through continuous static analysis with SonarQube and unit test coverage with JUnit 5.
Acted as QA on specific demands, creating and executing test scenarios to validate business rules and data consistency across microservices, optimizing time to meet final project delivery deadlines.
Standardized API documentation with Swagger/OpenAPI in alignment with front-end and QA teams.
Used Git (GitLab), Docker, and CI/CD pipelines in an agile Scrum environment.

Developed a complete hotel management SaaS using Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, HTML, CSS, and JS, covering registrations, reservations, stays, check-in/check-out, billing, inventory control, and a financial module with period-based reports.

Implemented JWT authentication with permission segregation by profile (reception, housekeeping, administration, finance) and deployed on a VM on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, containerized via Docker and configured for secure remote access.
Developed an AI agent for automated customer service via WhatsApp, integrated with LLM APIs for natural language processing and workflow management without human intervention.
Developed desktop applications in Java Swing/JavaFX with evolutionary maintenance, refactoring, and integrations with relational and non-relational databases.
Designed interfaces in Figma and converted prototypes into functional screens with HTML/CSS/JS, performing QA with test scenarios to validate business rules.
Managed scope, deadlines, and expectations independently in a 100% remote model, with a focus on clear communication and value delivery.

experience.company: SEAP - State Secretariat for Penitentiary Administration of Maranhao (Sao Luis, Maranhao, Brazil)
bullets: Supported Java development demands by identifying and fixing bugs in existing systems, contributing to code stability in a production environment.
Executed quality tests to validate deliverables, developing practical understanding of testing and QA processes.
Continuously improved technical skills in Java and back-end development within a real corporate environment.

experience.company: SEAP - State Secretariat for Penitentiary Administration of Maranhao (Sao Luis, Maranhao, Brazil)
bullets: Performed hardware/software support, network troubleshooting, and administration of internal tools.
Prioritized and resolved incident tickets with in-person, phone, and remote support, consistently leading in efficient technical problem resolution.
Developed spreadsheet automations for incident logging, optimizing processes and reducing time spent on recurring operational tasks.

experience.company: Instituto de Psiquiatria Ruy Palhano (Sao Luis, Maranhao, Brazil)
bullets: Supported IT support activities and administrative routines, developing customer service and technical problem-solving skills.
Managed operations, reservations, inventory, finances, and pricing, developing business insight and process management skills in a small business.

projects.title: Event System with Facial and Fingerprint Biometrics
projects.stack: Java, Spring Boot, SonarQube, PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, WebSocket
bullets: Designed and developed an asynchronous API for orchestrating inmate entries and exits, integrating Intelbras facial biometric devices via REST with real-time validation.
Decoupled services using RabbitMQ as a message broker, supporting high volumes of simultaneous events with high availability.
Streamed real-time updates to dashboards and monitoring systems via WebSocket.
Persisted detailed access, movement, and audit logs in PostgreSQL, ensuring full event traceability.
Applied static analysis with SonarQube, enhancing security, maintainability, and code standardization.

projects.title: Hotel Management SaaS
projects.stack: Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, HTML/CSS/JS, Oracle Cloud VM, QA, UI/UX, Figma
bullets: Developed a complete web application for hotel management, covering reservations, stays, check-in/check-out, and billing end-to-end.
Implemented JWT authentication with permission segregation by profile (reception, housekeeping, administration, finance).
Built a financial module with entries, receipts, discounts, and revenue reports by period.
Managed inventory of products consumed during stays (minibar, supplies) linked to consumption entries.
Deployed and configured the application on a VM on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, ensuring availability and secure remote access.
Designed interfaces and navigation flows in Figma and converted prototypes into functional screens with HTML/CSS/JS.
Acted as QA by creating and executing test scenarios to validate business rules and data consistency.

projects.title: AI Agent for WhatsApp Customer Service
projects.stack: Java, Spring Boot, AI (LLM), WhatsApp API, PostgreSQL, Oracle Cloud VM
bullets: Developed an AI agent for automated customer service via WhatsApp, capable of answering questions, collecting information, and conducting service workflows without human intervention.
Integrated the agent with LLM APIs for natural language processing and contextual response generation.
Persisted conversation history and collected data in PostgreSQL for traceability and service analysis.
Deployed the service on a VM on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure with environment configuration and continuous availability.

projects.title: Warehouse Microservice
bullets: Developed for inventory control with inbound, outbound, and transfer movements, item registration, suppliers, and cost centers.
Implemented consumption reports, replenishment alerts, and an audit trail with role-based access profiles.

projects.title: Help-Desk Microservice
bullets: Built an internal ticketing system with a complete workflow for opening, technical handling, transfer, and closure, including priorities, categories, and SLAs.
Recorded a full history of interactions and generated reports on volume, demand types, and support team performance.

projects.title: Dental Care Microservice
bullets: Developed management of dental records, appointments, diagnoses, and procedures linked to patients and professionals.
Included support for treatment planning, production reports, and access control to preserve clinical confidentiality.

projects.title: Clinical Care Microservice
bullets: Implemented electronic medical records with anamnesis, clinical progress notes, and prescriptions for medical and nursing consultations.
Added appointment scheduling, care indicators, and role-specific access profiles by professional type.

projects.title: Educational Care Microservice
bullets: Developed management of educational sessions with student, educator, class, and follow-up record registration.
Implemented attendance control, pedagogical reports, and distinct profiles for teachers, pedagogical coordinators, and management.

projects.title: Automated Operational and Attendance Reports
bullets: Automated PDF report generation from parameterizable templates integrated with back-end services, eliminating manual processes.
